name: Fire Bolt
description: A flickering flame hurls toward a creature in range. On hit it takes fire damage and flammable objects ignite.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature. No attack roll — target makes a Dex save or takes damage.

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral floating hand appears and can manipulate objects up to 10 pounds. Useful for grabbing things from a distance.

name: Thorn Whip
description: A vine-like whip lashes out. On hit the target takes damage and if Large or smaller is pulled 10 feet toward you.

name: Vicious Mockery
description: You hurl a string of insults so vicious they cause actual psychic damage. Target has disadvantage on next attack.

name: Healing Word
description: A quick prayer restores hit points to a creature in range. The go-to emergency heal.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of force appears. +5 to AC until the start of your next turn including against the triggering attack.

name: Cure Wounds
description: A creature you touch regains hit points. More potent than Healing Word but requires touch range.

name: Hunter's Mark
description: You mark a creature as your quarry. Deal extra damage on each hit and have advantage on tracking it.

name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out. Creatures in area take damage and are pushed 10 feet. Very loud.

name: Misty Step
description: You teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. Brief silver mist marks where you vanished.

name: Moonbeam
description: A silvery beam of pale light shines down. Creatures in the beam take radiant damage. Shapechangers have disadvantage.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: A floating spectral weapon appears and attacks. Doesn't require concentration — one of the best cleric spells.

name: Sneak Attack
description: Not a spell but a class feature. Once per turn deal extra damage when you have advantage or an ally is adjacent.

name: Fireball
description: A bright streak from your finger explodes into a 20-foot radius sphere of flame. The classic. Everyone's favorite.

name: Revivify
description: You touch a creature dead less than 1 minute. It returns to life with 1 hit point. Doesn't work on old age death.

name: Call Lightning
description: A storm cloud appears and you call bolts of lightning down each turn. Even stronger if used during an actual storm.

name: Counterspell
description: You interrupt a creature casting a spell. If 3rd level or lower it fails automatically. Higher levels require a check.

name: Wild Shape
description: Not a spell but a class feature. Transform into a beast you have seen. Circle of Moon druids get combat forms.

name: Smite (Divine)
description: Not a spell but a class feature. Expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage on a melee hit. The paladin's signature move.

name: Guardian of Faith
description: A Large spectral guardian appears and deals damage to hostile creatures that move within 10 feet.

name: Polymorph
description: Transform a creature into a beast. Turn an enemy into a snail or turn yourself into a T-Rex. Extremely versatile.

name: Ice Storm
description: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds an area. Creatures take bludgeoning and cold damage. Ground becomes difficult terrain.

name: Raise Dead
description: Return a dead creature to life (dead up to 10 days). Target takes -4 penalty to rolls that reduces by 1 per long rest.

name: Wall of Fire
description: Create a wall of fire up to 60 feet long. One side deals damage to creatures within 10 feet or passing through.
